summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Coach Lady Wassa admin-member management feature. All 11 backend tests PASS (admin auth, create member, duplicate/short-password validation, password reset, delete, enrollment). Frontend: admin login redirects correctly to /admin, create-member form works end-to-end, new member can login at /connexion and is redirected to /membre. Typos 'À propos' and 'Témoignages' are correctly displayed with accents in Navbar and Footer.

issues: Dashboard appears mostly empty below the welcome heading — may be due to lazy rendering of the formations section; visually the page renders but no formations list is visible in the viewport after fresh login. Worth verifying once MVP content is finalized.

hydration_warnings: Navbar.js lines 69-70: a raw <button> wraps the <Button> component (which itself renders a <button>), producing a React hydration warning 'button cannot be a descendant of button'. Purely cosmetic — no functional impact. Same pattern in Navbar mobile block (line 104). Recommend replacing outer <button> with <span> or attaching onClick directly to the Button component.

action_items: (Low priority) Fix nested <button> in Navbar.js lines 69-70 and 104 to silence hydration warnings — wrap onClick handler directly on the Button component instead of an outer <button>.
(Optional) Member dashboard could surface the enrolled formations more prominently on first load.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Should migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
admin_delete_member does not delete related notifications — orphan notifications will accumulate.
No rate-limiting on /api/admin/members create endpoint (only login has brute-force protection).
admin_create_member response uses '_id' key while /api/auth/login etc. use 'id' — small inconsistency in API contract but UI handles it correctly (uses m._id).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@ladywassa.com / LadyWassa2025!. Test member created at runtime with unique emails (uiuser_*@t.com / uipass123 for UI test; pytest_*@t.com / pytest123 for backend tests).
seed_data_creation: Backend test file creates ~5 TEST-prefixed throwaway members per run (not cleaned up — should be pruned periodically). Each uses unique UUID-based emails so no collisions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend admin member CRUD endpoints fully verified and integrated with UI. Admin login correctly routes to /admin (role-based redirect in LoginPage.js). New members created via admin UI can immediately login. Typos 'À propos' (Navbar line 8, Footer line 13) and 'Témoignages' (Footer line 14) are correctly displayed. Minor hydration warnings in Navbar due to nested <button>. OVH static deployment not tested as requested.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All acceptance criteria from the review request are met.
